title: Pinnacle Point Golf course voted best in South Africa
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Pinnacle Point Golf Course,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Pinnacle Point Golf Course, in Pinnacle Point Estate, Mossel Bay, was named South Africa's Best Golf Course for 2024 at the prestigious 11th annual World Golf Awards gala ceremony in Madeira, Portugal, on 22 November.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Pinnacle Point Golf Course, in Pinnacle Point Estate, Mossel Bay, was named South Africa's Best Golf Course for 2024 at the prestigious 11th annual World Golf Awards gala ceremony in Madeira, Portugal, on 22 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This coveted award reinforces Pinnacle Point Estate's reputation as a world-class golfing destination, celebrated for delivering an extraordinary golfing experience that ranks among the best globally."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We are truly humbled and grateful to receive this incredible honour,\" said Carl van der Linde, general manager of Pinnacle Point Estate.","html":"\"We are truly humbled and grateful to receive this incredible honour,\" said Carl van der Linde, general manager of Pinnacle Point Estate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This award reflects the unwavering dedication of our team, which works tirelessly to ensure every golfer enjoys an exceptional experience.\"","html":"\"This award reflects the unwavering dedication of our team, which works tirelessly to ensure every golfer enjoys an exceptional experience.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The World Golf Awards, a global authority recognising excellence in golf tourism, highlighted Pinnacle Point Estate's consistent commitment to quality, innovation and hospitality in the golfing arena.","html":"The World Golf Awards, a global authority recognising excellence in golf tourism, highlighted Pinnacle Point Estate's consistent commitment to quality, innovation and hospitality in the golfing arena."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The estate extends its heartfelt gratitude to golf director Quintin Byleveldt, golf course superintendent Konrad Suhr, the talented golfing staff, the golf committee and the entire Pinnacle Point Estate team for their hard work and passion for excellence.","html":"The estate extends its heartfelt gratitude to golf director Quintin Byleveldt, golf course superintendent Konrad Suhr, the talented golfing staff, the golf committee and the entire Pinnacle Point Estate team for their hard work and passion for excellence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We thank everyone who has supported us on this incredible journey,\" said Byleveldt.","html":"\"We thank everyone who has supported us on this incredible journey,\" said Byleveldt."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"We look forward to continuing to welcome visitors from around the world to enjoy an unforgettable golfing experience.\"","html":"\"We look forward to continuing to welcome visitors from around the world to enjoy an unforgettable golfing experience.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Special congratulations go to Peter Matkovich, the designer of Pinnacle Point's iconic course, who was awarded the esteemed title of Golf Course Designer of the Year 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Matkovich's visionary design perfectly marries the natural beauty of the Garden Route with a challenging, yet enjoyable course layout.","html":"Matkovich's visionary design perfectly marries the natural beauty of the Garden Route with a challenging, yet enjoyable course layout."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information about Pinnacle Point Estate, visit www.pinnaclepointestate.co.za.","html":"For more information about Pinnacle Point Estate, visit www.pinnaclepointestate.co.za."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
